briefing.arm: Arm announced a new AI CPU; shares jumped 8% after-hours.
briefing.sk_hynix: SK Hynix plans US listing in 2026; shares rose >5% in early trade.
briefing.cisco: Cisco entered AI agent security market with 'Cisco AI Defense' and 'DefenseClaw'.
